semantic.role: CLI help text renderer for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
responsibilities: Formats and prints the general help message listing all available commands and their categories (Setup & Config, Core Workflows, etc.).
Formats and prints detailed help for specific commands (init, try, sync, etc.) via a switch-based command help function.
Maintains up-to-date command descriptions including experimental features like the 'view' command runtime.
outOfScope: Command execution or business logic for any CLI command.
Pipeline orchestration, persistence, or core domain logic.
Configuration reading or writing (delegated to config module).
Git hook management logic (delegated to hook module).
invariants: Must not import or invoke any pipeline, persistence, or core domain logic (enforced by cli-entrypoint-separation rule).
Must remain a pure presentation layer for CLI help text, with no side effects beyond console output.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a thin CLI adapter for rendering help text, keeping command routing separate from business logic.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file; the git status shows no modifications to this file.

English.role: CLI help text renderer for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
responsibilities: Formats and prints the general help message listing all available commands and their categories.
Formats and prints detailed help for specific commands via a switch-based command help function.
Maintains up-to-date command descriptions including experimental features like the 'view' command runtime.
outOfScope: Command execution or business logic for any CLI command.
Pipeline orchestration, persistence, or core domain logic.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 命令行界面的帮助文本渲染器。
responsibilities: 格式化并打印通用帮助信息，列出所有可用命令及其分类。
通过基于 switch 的命令帮助函数，格式化并打印特定命令的详细帮助信息。
维护最新的命令描述，包括实验性功能（如 'view' 命令运行时）。
outOfScope: 任何 CLI 命令的执行或业务逻辑。
管道编排、持久化或核心领域逻辑。
